svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 243, 199), rgb(39, 30, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1E293B;

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Inter, Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#1E293B, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
